title: Villager Variety
description: Adds skin tone, eye color and eyebrow color variations to villagers.
body: I can't stand the constant racist comments whenever someone talks about Villager Variety! Please be respectful, this is completely ridiculous and was never the intention of the resource pack, I expected better from a modern society. **No racism will ever be tolerated!!!** --- ### Villagers all looking the same can be boring, so Villager Variety is here! Villager Variety adds **7 skin tone** (ranging from white to black), **5 eye colors variations** (green (Vanilla), blue, brown, hazel and amber) and **6 eyebrow color variations** (brown (Vanilla), black, auburn, ginger, blond and gray) for our beloved square-nosed who can only mutter and trade items for... interesting prices. ## There are 3 Villager Variety download options: - **Biome Dependent:** Variations appropriate for the climate of the biome where the villager spawned - **All Mixed:** Completely random variations, no matter what biome you are in - **Fresh Animations Add-ons** (of the 2 versions above): Requires Fresh Animations resource pack Choose freely what you think is best or what you like more
